cross_references.label: Isaiah 30:6
cross_references.text: This is the burden against the beasts of the Negev: Through a land of hardship and distress, of lioness and lion, of viper and flying serpent, they carry their wealth on the backs of donkeys and their treasures on the humps of camels, to a people of no profit to them.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 32:1
cross_references.text: Behold, a king will reign in righteousness, and princes will rule with justice.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 33:22
cross_references.text: For the LORD is our Judge, the LORD is our lawgiver, the LORD is our King. It is He who will save us.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 43:3
cross_references.text: For I am the LORD your God, the Holy One of Israel, your Savior; I give Egypt for your ransom, Cush and Seba in your place.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 43:11
cross_references.text: I, yes I, am the LORD, and there is no Savior but Me.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 57:15
cross_references.text: For thus says the One who is high and lifted up, who inhabits eternity, whose name is Holy: "I dwell in a high and holy place, and with the oppressed and humble in spirit, to restore the spirit of the lowly and revive the heart of the contrite.

cross_references.label: Isaiah 62:11
cross_references.text: Behold, the LORD has proclaimed to the ends of the earth, "Say to Daughter Zion: See, your Savior comes! Look, His reward is with Him, and His recompense goes before Him."

cross_references.label: Jeremiah 23:5
cross_references.text: Behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will raise up for David a righteous Branch, and He will reign wisely as King and will administer justice and righteousness in the land.

cross_references.label: Jeremiah 23:6
cross_references.text: In His days Judah will be saved, and Israel will dwell securely. And this is His name by which He will be called: The LORD Our Righteousness.

cross_references.label: Hosea 1:7
cross_references.text: Yet I will have compassion on the house of Judah, and I will save them--not by bow or sword or war, not by horses and cavalry, but by the LORD their God."

9:9.top_verse: Rejoice greatly, O Daughter of Zion! Shout in triumph, O Daughter of Jerusalem! See, your King comes to you, righteous and victorious, humble and riding on a donkey, on a colt, the foal of a donkey.

treasury.label: Zechariah 2:10
treasury.text: Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion: for, lo, I come, and I will dwell in the midst of thee, saith the LORD.

treasury.label: Psalm 97:6-8
treasury.text: The heavens declare his righteousness, and all the people see his glory…

treasury.label: Isaiah 12:6
treasury.text: Cry out and shout, thou inhabitant of Zion: for great is the Holy One of Israel in the midst of thee.

treasury.label: Psalm 2:6
treasury.text: Yet have I set my king upon my holy hill of Zion.

treasury.label: Psalm 45:1
treasury.text: To the chief Musician upon Shoshannim, for the sons of Korah, Maschil, A Song of loves. My heart is inditing a good matter: I speak of the things which I have made touching the king: my tongue is the pen of a ready writer.

treasury.label: Psalm 110:1-4
treasury.text: A Psalm of David. The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou at my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool…

treasury.label: Psalm 45:6,7
treasury.text: Thy throne, O God, is for ever and ever: the sceptre of thy kingdom is a right sceptre…

treasury.label: Psalm 85:9-12
treasury.text: Surely his salvation is nigh them that fear him; that glory may dwell in our land…

treasury.label: Isaiah 45:21
treasury.text: Tell ye, and bring them near; yea, let them take counsel together: who hath declared this from ancient time? who hath told it from that time? have not I the LORD? and there is no God else beside me; a just God and a Saviour; there is none beside me.

treasury.label: Matthew 11:29
treasury.text: Take my yoke upon you, and learn of me; for I am meek and lowly in heart: and ye shall find rest unto your souls.

treasury.label: Matthew 21:5-7
treasury.text: Tell ye the daughter of Sion, Behold, thy King cometh unto thee, meek, and sitting upon an ass, and a colt the foal of an ass…

treasury.label: Mark 11:7
treasury.text: And they brought the colt to Jesus, and cast their garments on him; and he sat upon him.
